text: Tragic news from two tornadoes overnight near Nashville. Now the the death toll has risen to 22 people. At least 40 buildings were left damaged by the storms, forcing schools, courts, transit lines, and the state capitol to close today. President Trump says he will visit the area on Friday. Some polling stations had to be moved; others opened late as a result of the damage. It is a Super Tuesday state. More on all of this throughout the day, right here on MSNBC. And stay with us. We'll be right back. Hey there, I'm Chris Hayes from MSNBC. Thanks for watching MSNBC on YouTube. If you want to keep up to date with the videos we're putting out, you can click Subscribe just below me, or click over on this list to see lots of other great videos.
